title: Bogcraft Modpack
description: A modpack that makes minecraft feel good again, with  many QoL features that just elavate the experience, from new block sounds and nicer animations to fun things like cats that groove along to Minecraft Bangers.
body:
A modpack that makes minecraft feel good again, with  many QoL features that just elavate the experience, from new block sounds and nicer animations to fun things like cats that groove along to Minecraft Bangers.

Main Resource pack from Vanilla Tweaks (vanillatweaks.net)
All other mods from Modrinth. 
See dependencies page for detailed list of mods.
